title: SOUJOY Springform Cake Pan, Non-Stick Cheesecake Pan, 14 x 9.6 Inch Large Rectangle Cake Pan with Removable Bottom, Ice Cream Cake Bakeware, Black, Christmas
features: Ideal Size: 14"L x 9.6"W x 3.1"H (35.5×24.5×8 cm) , bottom: 15.5''L x 11''W (39×28 cm) , large capacity for cake. Springform securely holds form together, prevents the batter from messy spills.
Premium Carbon Steel: SOUJOY Springform cake pan is made of carbon steel material, make sure cake can heat quickly and evenly. Heat-resistance temperature: 445℉. Hand wash only.
Nonstick Coating: Our cake pan has non-stick coating, which is a food grade safety material, nontoxic, easy food release and cleanup.
Removable Bottom: The cheesecake pan has has removable bottom and quick-release latch, allows the cake be easily removed, easy to clean.
Multi Baking Tool: This rectangle cake pan is perfect for birthday cake, ice cream cake, cheese cakes, deep dish pizza, pie. Suitable for home and holidays.
